title: Simple Chat Bubbles
description: Simple Chat Bubbles adds lightweight, clean chat bubbles above players’ heads so you can see who said what in-world, without constantly checking the chat window.
body:
![tittle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/739e22b6ee3eaf555a171801f9ce684e3161ec63_0.webp)

# VERY IMPORTANT! ⚠️

**CURRENTLY CHAT BUBBLES SHOW WHILE HAVING A INVISIBLE POTION! FIXING IT!**



## Intro! 

This mod gives you the ability to see what other people said on top of there heads!! Neat isn't it? Whether you are playing on a massive multiplayer network or surviving alone in a hardcore world, this mod ensures your friends see exactly what you're up to in style. It's the ultimate bridge between your game and your social circle! By bringing messages directly into the game world, you no longer have to squint at the chat box in the corner while trying to dodge a Creeper or finish a build.


## Configs 🔨

- **Typing Dots:** Typing dots show above your head as you type! It adds a dynamic ". . ." animation to let other players know a response is coming. No more awkward silences—your friends will see you are active and typing in real-time.
 
- **Chat Bubbles:** Automatically shows the chat above your head. Every message is wrapped in a clean, modern bubble that fits perfectly with the Minecraft aesthetic.

- **Fov Correction:** No more giant bubbles on Quake Pro! The mod intelligently scales bubbles based on your field of view settings so they always look just right.

- **Multiplayer Ready:** Works on all servers, even if the server doesn't have the mod! The mod "scrapes" your local chat hud to find player names and render bubbles above them instantly.

- **Smart Perspective:** Local player bubbles are automatically hidden in first-person view to keep your screen clear, but they show up perfectly when you switch to F5 (third-person) mode.

**Typing Dots Preview**

![typing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55ce0b55dfb2829ea0ecc9c4ab29e1db3df5f656_0.webp)

**Chat Bubbles Preview**

![bubbles!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6c336e48044b55c95ebeb1a6c98acb35f85eb06_0.webp)


## Utlites! 

![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b26e5f5f199c305aca861ecf49aae97731b24e27.png)



## MUST HAVE

⚠️ _You need to have installed fabric._


Most chat bubble mods are "all or nothing." They either crowd your screen with messy, intrusive UI or look completely outdated and basic. Simple Chat Bubbles is designed to be ultra-lightweight so it won't impact your FPS, all while giving you the cleanest, most polished look for your in-game conversations.
